description: Added generateReport that blocks the event loop
diff_summary: Added generateReport that synchronously builds a CSV string for potentially large datasets

edge_cases: Large datasets (10k+ rows) block Node.js event loop for hundreds of ms; no streaming — entire CSV built in memory before returning
ground_truth.broken_pattern: Synchronous loop in an async function — function is async but does no actual async work; should use streams or worker threads for large data
ground_truth.next_prompt: The API is timing out when generating reports with large datasets
ground_truth.notes: CPU-bound work in async function is a common Node.js anti-pattern
